sections.title: If the player has just arrived to Brother Jered

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Brother Jered, the monks in Varrock sent me. What is going on?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Thank Saradomin that you came! We need help! Oziach is trying to buy the monastery!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do to help?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: We've tried everything, there is nothing!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Unless...

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Are you any good at climbing trees?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pretty good, why?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Oziach is scared of ghosts! If you can climb a tree and make a scary noise, that might scare him off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, I can give that a go! What should I make the scary noise with?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: How about one of these wine bottles? I have loads!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure there's a perfectly sane explanation why.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I might have looked for a solution in them... And I found one, too!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Take this wine bottle and climb the tree nearest Oziach, then blow on it to scare him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do to help a bold adventurer like myself?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Not a lot from down here, sorry, I'm currently dealing with this mess! Come and see me upstairs and I can assist you with your question there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Praise be to Saradomin!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Yes! Praise he who brings life to this world.

sections.title: If Brother Jered said to take the wine bottle, but the player has never received Jered's empty wine bottle before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the bottle, can I have another one please?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go. You can blow into the top to make a spooky sound.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: If you're hiding up a tree when you do it, it should fool Oziach into thinking it's a ghost!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Would you like to try that now?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Take this wine bottle and climb the tree nearest Oziach, then blow on it to scare him!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go. You can blow into the top to make a spooky sound.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: If you're hiding up a tree when you do it, it should fool Oziach into thinking it's a ghost!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Would you like to try that now?

sections.title: If the player has received Jered's empty wine bottle at least once

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the bottle, can I have another one please?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go, try not to lose this one!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Would you like to try and scare Oziach now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hi [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have another wine bottle? I dropped the other one.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Sure, I have plenty.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go, try not to lose this one!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Would you like to try and scare Oziach now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's scare Oziach!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Be careful, make sure you don't get too close to him, or take too long, he'll be sure to spot you!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Okay, come back and talk to me when you're ready to try scaring Oziach!

sections.title: If the player has just attempted to scare Oziach and he wasn't scared of one ghost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the bottle, can I have another one please?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go. You can blow into the top to make a spooky sound.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: If you're hiding up a tree when you do it, it should fool Oziach into thinking it's a ghost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It didn't work!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Scaring Oziach? He wasn't scared?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! He said one ghost wasn't enough! But I have a plan...

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: A plan?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! ONE ghost wasn't enough. We need more than one ghost. We need TWO ghosts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you be my accomplice and be the second ghost?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I would, but I don't feel too well from all the stress.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure it's not all the wine and food?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing! That's okay, I hope you feel better soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to find an accomplice elsewhere, then. Do you have any ideas?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hmm... you could try placing an ad in the Varrock Herald. You can speak to Benny by the protesters in Varrock Square to do this.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: The price to place an advert is 500,000 coins. I've always had good responses to my ads in the past.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 500,000 coins? That is quite a lot!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Ah yes, don't worry about that. I have this pre-paid ad coupon you can use.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I bought an ad spot in the paper the other week. I was going to place an ad for recruiting some new monks.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: However with everything going on right now, I think this is more important.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the coupon! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you! You had me worried there that I was going to have to find 500,000 coins. I'll go and place the advert.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Good luck, I hope you find a good accomplice!

sections.title: If the player has never received a coupon from Brother Jered yet, and there's a coupon waiting

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the coupon! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Here you go.

sections.title: If the player has received an ad coupon at least once, but Benny has not finalized it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the coupon, can I have another one please?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Have you placed the advert in the Varrock Herald yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Don't wait too long, the purchase will go through soon!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You can find Benny in the Varrock Square. You should talk to him about the ad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go and do that now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have another coupon before I go? I lost the other one.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't need a coupon anymore!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You don't have any space for the coupon! Talk to me again once you have space.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Here is a copy of it. I made it before I gave you the original, try not to lose this!

sections.title: If Benny has finished the advert, but the player hasn't visited the Blue Moon Inn to see Iffie

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: How is it going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well thanks, I've just placed the advert in the Herald.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Lovely! Where are you meeting the candidates?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: At the Blue Moon Inn, I'm going to head there now.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Good luck!

sections.title: If the player has visited the Blue Moon Inn to see Iffie, but Iffie hasn't moved to south of the monastery yet

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hello [player name]. I thank you for helping us, we've been running out of ideas!

sections.title: If Iffie has moved to south of the monastery, but before the player has finished watching the cutscene where Oziach runs off until the very end:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hello! I saw an old lady sneaking around in the trees south of the monastery, that wouldn't be anything to do with you, would it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds like Iffie, she is my accomplice! I'd be careful calling her an old lady!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You found somebody! Great, good luck!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I'll make sure not to say that to her face if we meet!

sections.title: If the player has finished watching the cutscene where Oziach runs off until the very end, but before the player given Iffie her reward and started watching the cutscene at Thessalia's Fine Clothes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I hear Oziach has been scared, thank you! And thank your friend too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Iffie? She helped a lot, I need to go and give her the reward I promised.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You better go and do that then, thanks again!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Hello, Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hello! I was just passing by and saw you both in here.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I'd like to thank you Iffie, and you [player name]. You both saved the monastery.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: That means more than you can imagine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was really no problem, if anything, it was rather fun!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Yes, very fun! I haven't had such an adventure in years!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Well, I am glad you both enjoyed it! I do have something for you, [player name]...

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: It's not a reward as such, but it is interesting. I've been tidying up my office since I don't need it anymore.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: And in doing so, I found this old bottle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that... a ghost, inside? It's haunted?!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Yes! There is a ghost inside, it's trapped! Would have been handy to have earlier on, really. Would have been very scary for Oziach!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: But the monastery is saved, so I don't need it anymore. I'd like you to have it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. What do I do with it?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Not a lot really. I did shake it earlier and the ghost got pretty angry with me, so I'd probably avoid doing that too much.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: It does seem quite chatty for a ghost, although it doesn't always make sense.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: There you go. Now I'll be off, I've got a monastery to look after!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: See you later Brother Jered!
